title: pelargonium × picturatum
intro: Pelargonium × picturatum, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of the Pelargonium genus, characterized by its fragrant, pink or white flowers and leaves with a strong rose-like scent. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which are derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to alleviate stress, anxiety, and menstrual cramps, as well as its potential to regulate blood sugar levels and promote better sleep. Herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation.
